features.name: wide ternary returning concatenation
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator that returns a concatenation of signals spanning multiple bit widths (e.g., 1+32+128 bits)

features.name: non-blocking assignment with concatenation LHS
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment where the left-hand side is a concatenation of signals from interface members

features.name: interface with mixed-width signal members
features.description: Code should include an interface with signal members of varying bit widths spanning 1, 32, and 128 bits

features.name: array of interface instances with conditional selection
features.description: Code should include an array of interface instances selected via ternary operator based on a condition
